title: Humans Mod
description: Add controllable, cinematic human entities to Minecraft for story creators
body:
![Humans Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/334158ec821dcef37b9a5d7284c745bb746a2922_0.webp)
# Humans Mod

**Humans Mod** is a Minecraft mod that allows content creators, filmmakers, and storybuilders to add highly customizable human-like entities to their world.

### ✨ Features

- Switch between multiple models and textures.
- Make entities sit, sleep, or follow a path.
- Possess an entity and control it just like the player (movement, camera, and building).
- Dedicated texture/model selection GUI.
- Perfect for cinematic scenes, roleplay, or machinima.

### 🔮 Planned Features

- Facial animation and expression control.
- Scripted dialogues and sequences.
- Integration with Replay Mod.

### 🎨 Create Your Own Skin or Animation!

You can download the official model file here:  
👉 [`models/humans-mod-model.zip`]([models/humans-mod-model.zip](https://github.com/mustafa3max/humans-mod-page/blob/main/models/humans-mod-model.zip))

> ⚠️ **Important:**  
> Do **not** modify the model structure in any way — including bone names, sizes, or hierarchy — or your custom skin/animation may not work correctly.

✅ You're allowed to:
- Create custom skins using this model
- Make your own animations using GeckoLib (without changing the model)

📩 Want your animation featured in the next release?  
Feel free to reach out and submit your `.json` animation files for review!

Created with ❤️ for Minecraft storytellers.
